effect:
**Flawless Spirit of Mordred Lineage**

**On Enter:** Look at the top card of your deck. If its an attack card, you may banish it. If you do, you may activate that card this turn.

[Mordred Bonus] **Inherited Effect **— As long as Mordred has leveled up this turn, the first attack card you activate this turn costs 2 less to activate.

editions.effect: Attack cards in your graveyard have **floating memory**.
editions.effect_raw: Attack cards in your graveyard have floating memory.
editions.flavor: With swordistry embodying the idea of a torrent, Mordred gives foes no respite from his blade.
editions.effect_html: Attack cards in your graveyard have floating memory.

effect: Attack cards in your graveyard have **floating memory**. *(While paying for a memory cost, you may banish a card with **floating memory** from your graveyard to pay for 1 of that cost.)*
effect_raw: Attack cards in your graveyard have floating memory. (While paying for a memory cost, you may banish a card with floating memory from your graveyard to pay for 1 of that cost.)
flavor: "Do try to keep up, won't you?"
name: Mordred, Flawless Blade

rule.description: Multiple instances of floating memory on the same card are redundant. Any instances beyond the first are ignored.

effect_html: Attack cards in your graveyard have floating memory. (While paying for a memory cost, you may banish a card with floating memory from your graveyard to pay for 1 of that cost.)

effect:
**Mordred Lineage**

Mordred can level up into champions of the same base level. When he does, draw two cards.

Attack cards in your graveyard have **floating memory** and "**Ephemerate — **(X)", where **X** is that card's reserve cost. *(You may activate cards with **ephemerate** from your graveyard by paying that cost. Attack cards played this way become **ephemeral** in the intent.)*
effect_raw:
Mordred Lineage

Mordred can level up into champions of the same base level. When he does, draw two cards.

Attack cards in your graveyard have floating memory and "Ephemerate — (X)", where X is that card's reserve cost. (You may activate cards with ephemerate from your graveyard by paying that cost. Attack cards played this way become ephemeral in the intent.)
name: Mordred, Fated Luminary
effect_html: Mordred LineageMordred can level up into champions of the same base level. When he does, draw two cards.Attack cards in your graveyard have floating memory and "Ephemerate — X", where X is that card's reserve cost. (You may activate cards with ephemerate from your graveyard by paying that cost. Attack cards played this way become ephemeral in the intent.)

effect:
**Spellshroud**

[Mordred Bonus] As long as an opponent has **influence** eight or more, CARDNAME gets +4[POWER]. *(A player’s **influence** is equal to the total amount of cards in their hand and memory.)*

[Mordred Bonus] Whenever a **durability** counter is removed from CARDNAME, you may return a card from your memory to your hand.
effect_raw:
Spellshroud

[Mordred Bonus] As long as an opponent has influence eight or more, Rhongomiant gets +4POWER. (A player’s influence is equal to the total amount of cards in their hand and memory.)

[Mordred Bonus] Whenever a durability counter is removed from Rhongomiant, you may return a card from your memory to your hand.

editions.flavor: Reveal the truth hidden in shadows.
Swordsmen are wont to speak through steel.
See beyond worldly perception and unveil the sacred truths hidden from the world.

editions.flavor: Not even the most fantastical realm is free from taxes.
The Mandate of Heaven stops even steel.
A ring that commands both fear and respect.
Not even the most fantastical realm is free from taxes.
The Mandate of Heaven stops even steel.
The  Mandate of Heaven stops even steel.
If only all was fair in taxes as it is in war.

This card costs 1 less to activate if you control a Sword weapon.

rule.description: Deflecting Edge can only prevent combat damage, which is damage dealt by attacks.
The damage prevented does not need to be from one source. E.g. three different sources each dealing 1 combat damage each can all be prevented in the same turn.

effect: **On Enter:** You may banish two cards at random from your memory. If you do, level up your champion. *(Your champion levels up into a compatible champion card from your material deck, ignoring materialization costs.)*

rule.description: When opting for Dungeon Guide's effect, you may choose to fail to find a champion card from your material deck.
Dungeon Guide's ability of banishing two cards from your memory is not considered a cost. This means that you can't use Floating Memory to pay for this effect.

Savagery is a last resort, born of necessity.

editions.flavor: Fairy King Mordred commanded the loyalty of all, including the frost.
Conjured ice cold enough to chill to the bone. Or sharp enough to pierce the heart.
"Feel the might of a true frost dragon!"

effect: Deal 2 damage to target unit. That unit doesn't wake up during its controller's next wake up phase.
effect_raw: Deal 2 damage to target unit. That unit doesn't wake up during its controller's next wake up phase.
flavor: Sharpened shards carrying a piercing chill freeze almost everything to the core."
name: Freezing Hail

result_editions.flavor: Fairy King Mordred commanded the loyalty of all, including the frost.

effect_html: Deal 2 damage to target unit. That unit doesn't wake up during its controller's next wake up phase.

editions.flavor: "You didn't think I could only make things, did you? Y-you did? Take that back!"
Deep in Wonderland lies a cove of ice, where legends speak of a gryphon and turtle's waltz.
"You didn't think I could only make things, did you? Y-you did? Take that back!"
She could tame the cold in both man and nature.
"Praying for peace won't end a war. Fighting for what you believe in will."
"Praying for peace won't end a war. Fighting for what you believe in will."

effect: **Negate** target card activation unless its controller pays (2). Banish the card that had its activation **negated** this way.
effect_raw: Negate target card activation unless its controller pays (2). Banish the card that had its activation negated this way.
flavor: "O'Lumina who shelters us, bind those who seek us harm in frost. Grant us peace under your blessing."
name: Frostbind

result_editions.flavor: She could tame the cold in both man and nature.

rule.description: If Frostbind negates an attack card, the combat phase never gets to begin. This means that On Attack effects will not trigger. The attacker remains rested if resting that unit was an additional cost of that attack card.
The (2) in Frostbind's negate condition is a reserve cost, and can be paid by resting objects with reservable.

effect_html: Negate target card activation unless its controller pays 2. Banish the card that had its activation negated this way.

Mordred Bonus 2, Discard this card from your hand: The next non-Command attack card you activate this turn doesn't rest its attacker as part of its cost.
